purpose: Accept a normalized Obsidian note payload from a watcher or manual trigger, call memory-api /ingest/document, and return a concise ingest result.
dependencies: Memory API Header Auth credential in n8n
Obsidian watcher or manual webhook caller
notes: Default source should be obsidian when omitted by the caller.
This workflow is intentionally thin; file discovery and scheduling stay outside n8n node logic.
